test.create_query: CREATE TABLE test_strings_200000 ( col1 LowCardinality(String), col2 LowCardinality(String) ) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY col1;
CREATE TABLE test_strings_20000 ( col1 LowCardinality(String), col2 LowCardinality(String) ) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY col1;
CREATE TABLE test_strings_2000 ( col1 LowCardinality(String), col2 LowCardinality(String) ) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY col1;
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO test_strings_200000 SELECT lc AS col1, lc AS col2 FROM ( SELECT toLowCardinality(toString(number % 200000)) AS lc FROM numbers(10000000) );
INSERT INTO test_strings_20000 SELECT lc AS col1, lc AS col2 FROM ( SELECT toLowCardinality(toString(number % 20000)) AS lc FROM numbers(10000000) );
INSERT INTO test_strings_2000 SELECT lc AS col1, lc AS col2 FROM ( SELECT toLowCardinality(toString(number % 2000)) AS lc FROM numbers(10000000) );
test.query: SELECT DISTINCT col1 FROM test_strings_200000 FORMAT Null
SELECT DISTINCT col2 FROM test_strings_200000 FORMAT Null
SELECT DISTINCT col1 FROM test_strings_20000 FORMAT Null
SELECT DISTINCT col2 FROM test_strings_20000 FORMAT Null
SELECT DISTINCT col1 FROM test_strings_2000 FORMAT Null
SELECT DISTINCT col2 FROM test_strings_2000 FORMAT Null
